creator: steveroggenkamp@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 180800
SVN diff file for security/veracrypt

A new port of VeraCrypt to FreeBSD.

VeraCrypt is free open-source disk encryption software.

WWW: http://www.veracrypt.org/

Everything seems to work, although I have not systematically tested every feature at this point.

This port passes all of the tests described in section 3.4 of the Porter's Handbook, although pkglint fails it due to the use of a specific commit in the name.  This should be resolved with VeraCrypt release 1.20 in the near future as it will not build with release 1.19.

I have also successfully built and used it on GhostBSD 10.3-RELEASE running on an ancient Intel Atom powered netbook.
